title: ImplementationContract
description: Pre-implementation agreement between worker and reviewers. Worker proposes concrete actions, edge case handling, and demo steps. quality_specialist and design_authority approve before implementation begins.

worker.description: Agent who will implement (the assigned implementer)

planned_actions.description: Concrete actions the worker will take to fulfill the TaskContract

edge_cases.description: Edge cases the worker plans to handle

state_transitions.description: State transitions the implementation will introduce (e.g., 'unauthenticated -> authenticated')

non_goals.description: What this implementation explicitly will NOT do. Prevents scope creep.

demo_steps.description: Step-by-step procedure to demonstrate and verify completion
